mapper.select: SELECT c.commentId, c.postId, c.boardId, c.parentCommentId, c.depth, c.content, c.isAnonymous, c.likeCount, c.useYn, c.createdUser, c.createdDate, c.updateUser, c.updatedDate, CASE WHEN l.likeId IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS isLiked FROM board_comment c LEFT JOIN board_like l ON l.targetType = 'COMMENT' AND l.targetId = c.commentId AND l.createdUser = #{currentUser} WHERE c.postId = #{postId} AND c.useYn = 'Y' ORDER BY c.createdDate, c.commentId
SELECT commentId, postId, boardId, parentCommentId, depth, content, isAnonymous, likeCount, useYn, createdUser, createdDate, updateUser, updatedDate FROM board_comment WHERE commentId = #{commentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_comment (commentId, postId, boardId, parentCommentId, depth, content, isAnonymous, useYn, createdUser, updateUser) VALUES (#{commentId}, #{postId}, #{boardId}, #{parentCommentId}, #{depth}, #{content}, #{isAnonymous}, #{useYn}, #{createdUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.update: UPDATE board_comment SET content = #{content}, isAnonymous = #{isAnonymous}, useYn = #{useYn}, updateUser = #{updateUser}, updatedDate = NOW() WHERE commentId = #{commentId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_comment WHERE commentId = #{commentId}
mapper.update: UPDATE board_comment SET likeCount = likeCount + 1 WHERE commentId = #{commentId}
UPDATE board_comment SET likeCount = GREATEST(likeCount - 1, 0) WHERE commentId = #{commentId}
mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT('CMT', LPAD( COALESCE(CAST(SUBSTRING(MAX(commentId), 4) AS UNSIGNED), 0) + 1, 7, '0' )) AS nextCommentId FROM board_comment WHERE commentId REGEXP '^CMT[0-9]+$'
